unit.note: client vitest 208 files / 2025 passed (206/2017 on main: +2 files = ModalScrollBody.test.tsx + the modal-scroll-body-invariant meta-test, +8 tests). server vitest 178 files / 2085 passed + 1 skipped (untouched). tsc --noEmit clean; oxlint clean on all touched files. doc-sync.test.ts green, so the new CLAUDE.md DO-NOT #24 is consistent.

integration.note: No integration surface: presentational refactor + a source-scanning meta-test. No route, store, contract, or cross-component machinery touched.

e2e.note: F0.5 gate, 24 tests, exit 0. The load-bearing one is triage-fix-now-more-options-clip.spec.ts: it proves the PR #250 clip fix SURVIVES this refactor (0px clipped, modal body scrolls). Plus triage-fix-now (both dialog bodies) + 80-tablet-responsive 21/21. campaign-status-filter fails in the isolated stack, but fails IDENTICALLY with my CampaignsLane change reverted (verified) — the lane element never mounts (no campaign fixtures under the temp USERPROFILE), so it is a fixture gap, not a regression.

design_fidelity.note: Behavior-preserving refactor — no visual change by construction; the class sets are identical (ModalShell) or gain only a verified no-op guard.

smoke.note: Isolated single-process stack (built client + SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR + tsx on :3902, temp USERPROFILE, 127.0.0.1): /api/health 200.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behavior the diff introduces or changes: the carrier's contract (2), behavior-PRESERVATION for each of the 3 dialog bodies it now backs (3), the 2 lanes newly guarded (2), the ratchet's own two guarantees (2), the end-to-end proof that the PR #250 fix survives (1), non-regression (1), and the bloat-baseline hold (1) = 12 behaviors.

behaviors.behavior: ModalScrollBody always emits the invariant half (flex-col + overflow-y-auto + [&>*]:shrink-0)
ModalScrollBody merges the caller's variable half (height budget + gap) without dropping the guard
behaviors.evidence: ModalScrollBody.test.tsx (asserts max-h-[calc(100vh-260px)] + gap-3.5 + the guard coexist)

behaviors.behavior: ModalShell's body keeps its EXACT pre-refactor class set (behavior preservation)
behaviors.evidence: The pre-existing ModalShell.test.tsx fence from PR #250 (asserts overflow-y-auto + max-h-[calc(100vh-280px)] + [&>*]:shrink-0) still passes unchanged.

behaviors.behavior: ContinuePipelineModal's body now inherits the guard (it had none)
behaviors.evidence: ContinuePipelineModal.test.tsx 'scroll body inherits the bounded-scroll-container guard'

behaviors.behavior: EditTaskModal's body now inherits the guard, with its DIFFERENT budget (260px/gap-3.5) preserved
behaviors.evidence: EditTaskModal.test.tsx 'scroll body inherits the bounded-scroll-container guard'

behaviors.behavior: The TaskBoard column lane is guarded (its apparent child-layer guard was a no-op: TaskCard's shrink-0 sits on a grandchild behind DraggableCard's wrapper div)
behaviors.evidence: modal-scroll-body-invariant.test.ts structural scan (falsified: removing the class makes it FAIL and name the file)

behaviors.behavior: The Campaigns lane is guarded (bounded via max-h-[40vh]; invisible to the first draft of the ratchet)
RATCHET: any NEW self-scrolling column-flex container without the guard fails the build
behaviors.evidence: modal-scroll-body-invariant.test.ts — falsified against 5 evasions (max-h-[85vh], overflow-auto, max-h-[calc(100dvh-..)], flex-1-bounded, guard-only-in-a-comment): ALL caught. vitest gates CI; Playwright does not.

behaviors.behavior: RATCHET: a ModalScrollBody caller cannot smuggle a class beyond max-h-*/gap-* (no tailwind-merge, so a stray overflow-visible would silently win/lose by source order)
behaviors.evidence: modal-scroll-body-invariant.test.ts 'callers pass only the variable half'

behaviors.behavior: The PR #250 clip fix still holds THROUGH the refactor (the whole point of behavior preservation)
behaviors.evidence: e2e/flows/triage-fix-now-more-options-clip.spec.ts GREEN in real Chromium against the refactored build (0px clipped, body scrolls).

behaviors.behavior: No regression to the create-dialog bodies or the responsive bands
behaviors.evidence: triage-fix-now.spec.ts (new-task + new-iterate bodies) + 80-tablet-responsive 21/21. F0.5: 24 tests, exit 0.

behaviors.behavior: Both grandfathered bloat-baseline files stay AT baseline (the anti-ratchet hook blocks any growth)
